articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: PNW doctor from hantavirus ship taken to special isolation unit - The Seattle Times
articles.description: An oncologist traveling on a cruise ship amid a hantavirus outbreak says he's the lone American isolated at a special biocontainment unit in Nebraska.
articles.content:
An oncologist traveling on the cruise ship at the center of a hantavirus outbreak says he’s the lone American isolated at a special biocontainment unit in Nebraska.
Dr. Stephen Kornfeld of Bend, Ore… [+2545 chars]
